method.source_policy: Prefer official federal, state, county, city, school, utility and special-district sources.

activities.reason: Cross-agency address, utility, vehicle, voter, school and emergency setup with deadlines.
Local earthquake, wildfire, flood and hazardous-material risks; missed steps can affect life safety.
Permit selection, plan review, contractor, inspection and closeout dependencies create cost and safety risk.
Residents must distinguish emergencies, urgent non-emergencies and trackable service requests.
Seasonal registration windows, residency rules, fees, inclusion needs and refund policies.
Entity, zoning, permits, business license, home occupation and county/state dependencies.
Address verification, district assignment, records, health forms and deadlines.
License, insurance, scope, permits, payment schedule and completion evidence.
Security, utilities, deliveries, emergency contacts and optional police vacation-check service.
Shelter, licensing, vaccination, housing and emergency-preparedness dependencies.
Agenda review, comment deadlines, evidence preparation and follow-up.
Facility, insurance, food, alcohol, noise, traffic and special-event permit branches.
Card eligibility, identity/address evidence, digital access and account responsibilities.
Evacuation, alerts, defensible space, insurance and household readiness.
Local fault risk requires supplies, family communication, utility safety and recovery planning.
